title: Erratum: A Central Role of Salicylic Acid in Plant Disease Resistance
publisher: American Association for the Advancement of Science (AAAS)
abstract:
In the report "A central role of salicylic acid in plant disease resistance" by T. P. Delaney
            et al
            . (18 Nov., p. 1247), the name of the parasite in line 11 of the second column on page 1249 was misprinted. It should have been "
            Peronospora parasitica.
            "
